name: Wise
description: Wise (formerly TransferWise) is an international money transfer platform. It lets you create quotes for currency exchanges, set up recipients, initiate transfers, and manage multi-currency balances at the real mid-market exchange rate.

capabilities.name: profiles_list
capabilities.description: List all profiles (personal and business) for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: profiles_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific profile by ID.

capabilities.name: quotes_create
capabilities.description: Create a quote for an international money transfer, locking the exchange rate for a limited time.

capabilities.name: quotes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of an existing quote.

capabilities.name: recipients_create
capabilities.description: Create a recipient account with banking details for sending money.

capabilities.name: recipients_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific recipient account.

capabilities.name: recipients_list
capabilities.description: List all recipient accounts for a profile, optionally filtered by currency.

capabilities.name: recipients_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a recipient account.

capabilities.name: transfers_create
capabilities.description: Create a transfer based on an existing quote and a recipient account.

capabilities.name: transfers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details and status of a specific transfer.

capabilities.name: transfers_list
capabilities.description: List all transfers for a profile.

capabilities.name: transfers_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a transfer that has not yet been funded.

capabilities.name: transfers_fund
capabilities.description: Fund a transfer from your Wise multi-currency balance.

capabilities.name: exchange_rates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve current or historical exchange rates between two currencies.

capabilities.name: balances_list
capabilities.description: List all balances across currencies in a multi-currency account.

capabilities.name: balances_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific balance by ID.

capabilities.name: balances_create
capabilities.description: Create a new balance in a specific currency.

capabilities.name: balances_delete
capabilities.description: Delete/close a balance account.

capabilities.name: balance_statements_get
capabilities.description: Get a statement for a balance showing all transactions in a period.

capabilities.name: currencies_list
capabilities.description: List all currencies supported by Wise.

capabilities.name: balance_conversions_create
capabilities.description: Convert money between two currency balances using a quote.
